weight_estimate.method: Bounding-box area scaled against an assumed smart-bin camera field of view.
weight_estimate.reference_note: For production accuracy, calibrate against a known reference marker or bin geometry.

risk_assessment.note: Suitable for routine segregation with standard handling.

recycling_suggestion.title: Plastic recovery
recycling_suggestion.description: Empty, rinse, and dry the plastic item before placing it in the recyclable bin.

awareness_tip.title: Why this matters
awareness_tip.description: Clean recyclable sorting reduces contamination and helps materials re-enter the circular economy.

lifecycle.title: Waste
lifecycle.description: Item enters the segregation pipeline at source.

lifecycle.title: Collection
lifecycle.description: Municipal or community teams collect separated streams.

lifecycle.title: Sorting
lifecycle.description: AI detection and human checks improve stream purity.

lifecycle.title: Processing
lifecycle.description: Materials are cleaned, shredded, composted, or stabilized.

lifecycle.title: Reuse
lifecycle.description: Recovered material re-enters the circular economy.

government_initiatives.title: Swachh Bharat Mission
government_initiatives.value: Urban cleanliness and waste management drive
government_initiatives.note: Promotes source segregation, door-to-door collection, and waste processing adoption.

government_initiatives.title: MoHUA Focus
government_initiatives.note: Municipal solid waste programs prioritize segregated collection and recovery infrastructure.
government_initiatives.source: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

city_statistics.title: Smart City Readiness
city_statistics.note: Illustrative readiness score for digital waste tracking and citizen participation features.

city_statistics.title: Cleanliness Benchmark
city_statistics.note: Cities improve ranking by increasing segregation, recycling, and citizen reporting.

collection_schedule_options.title: Book Regular Pickup
collection_schedule_options.description: Bundle this item with the next municipal segregated collection round.

collection_schedule_options.title: Schedule Hazardous Drop-Off
collection_schedule_options.description: Reserve a supervised slot for e-waste, batteries, and chemical containers.

collection_schedule_options.title: Report Illegal Dumping
collection_schedule_options.description: Escalate unmanaged dumping spots to civic teams for clean-up.

education_module.title: School / College Awareness Mode
education_module.summary: Simple environmental explanations, decomposition awareness, and a quick quiz make the platform useful for workshops and campus campaigns.

quiz.question: How long can plastic remain in the environment?
quiz.explainer: Decomposition time is a strong awareness tool for encouraging correct segregation behavior.

system_goal: Reduce human effort in waste segregation while providing recycling guidance and awareness for smarter sustainable waste management.
confidence_note: Inference is deterministic with fixed seeds, RGB conversion, MobileNetV2-style normalization, and no augmentation during prediction.
